title: After the End of the End of Evangelion
display_title: After the End of the End of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: After the End of the End of Evangelion             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Thu May 14, 2015 3:57 pm I got this idea from having recently watched the series Key:The Metal Idol. After the credits there is a "hidden scene" that acts as the true conclusion to the series. So, my question is, if ep. 26 of NGE or if EoE had a post-credits scene, what would do you imagine either one of those would look like (hypothetically speaking of course)?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu May 14, 2015 5:00 pm One More Final is essentially the bonus scene of EoE, and it is glorious.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu May 14, 2015 5:42 pm Probably would have played out similar to the image from the Japanese limited edition EoE 26' LD cover : Seems like a likely post-credits of kimochi warui and all that.

[]:             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Thu May 14, 2015 6:24 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Probably would have played out similar to the image from the Japanese limited edition EoE 26' LD cover : Seems like a likely post-credits of kimochi warui and all that.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Thu May 14, 2015 6:35 pm It's probably the most painful thing about EoE for me, just wanting to see five more minutes beyond that scene to see what they do next. As with SSD I imagine it'll be a case of them sat on the beach talking, and staring out at the giant head like in the image. Not really sure what the conversation will be, probably remarkably awkward depending on what memories they retained from Third Impact, what feelings were retained and how willing each other is to progress. I would imagine another possibility is them heading into the ruins of Tokyo-3 to find some form of shelter or supplies.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 14, 2015 7:24 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Thu May 14, 2015 7:27 pm Reichu wrote: I really want to know how a decapitated, bisected head managed to right itself like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Thu May 14, 2015 8:27 pm Rei died for their sins. I imagine a conversation between the two would go like- Shinji - "We should probably find shelter somewhere..." Asuka - "Yea, let's go." Or something like that, it is beyond me how those two would even start a conversation while looking at a giant Rei head. Also I imagine that Asuka wouldn't have her usual mood of insults as they both have awoken from a catastrophe with Revelations not only about themselves but eachother. Haven't plenty of Fanfic authors gone down this route? I know Bagheera has.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu May 14, 2015 11:43 pm In many post-3I fics I've read (and one or two I wrote years back), the default is them finding food/shelter for sure. I'd imagine a very long awkward silence between them, considering the strangle attempt and all. Probably Asuka would be the one to break the silence--I'd wager Shinji would be feeling too heavily guilty to say anything. Hopefully he'd be more coherent/not as nutty as the final scene, though!

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri May 15, 2015 12:35 am Reichu wrote: I really want to know how a decapitated, bisected head managed to right itself like that.

[]: Re: After the End of the End of Evangelion             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri May 15, 2015 1:15 am SawItAtAge10 wrote: I got this idea from having recently watched the series Key:The Metal Idol. After the credits there is a "hidden scene" that acts as the true conclusion to the series.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Fri May 15, 2015 2:51 am Sicarius VI wrote: Haven't plenty of Fanfic authors gone down this route? I know Bagheera has.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri May 15, 2015 10:16 am Tines: Hm? With Hobo-Simon and President Gendo, you're not thinking about the Rebuilds now, are you? jcmoorehead : Yep, in fics like that, generally people return (if the authors choose to) a little later down the line, or I think in some, Asuka and Shinji happen to bump into whoever also looking for food/shelter. Like, they washed up on another part of the shore.

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Mon May 18, 2015 10:31 pm I always envisioned a brief sequence wherein Shinji, having completely failed at anything even remotely resembling a conversation with Asuka, stands by himself near the shoreline, grabs the nearest rock he can find and flings it towards the ocean with all of his remaining strength, momentarily distracting himself from everything as he simply enjoys the sight of the stone rapidly skimming over the red surface of the water, leaving intense ripples in its wake. Unfortunately, the newly reborn entity previously known as Misato Katsuragi happened to choose that precise moment to re-enter the world of the living and, just as she was in the process of leaving her non-corporeal, hive-mind existence behind forever, bracing to dramatically inhale her first breath of air the very instant her face triumphantly rose above the surface of the water... well, before she could even focus her newly-gained individual consciousness, something inexplicably struck her right between the eyes. Hey, nobody ever said this post Third Impact world would be all puppies and rainbows. Let that be a lesson to you. FIN

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Tue May 19, 2015 3:27 am -Pan up to Gendo and Fuyutsuki lying in clouds, now angels of the afterlife kind- Gendo: [to the audience] "You know, maybe that wasn't such a hot idea after all." Fuyutsuki: [also to the audience] "Good night folks." -iris out- THAT'S ALL FOLKS NEON GENESIS EVANGELION (reg. Japan pat. off) PRODUCED BY GANAIX LTD.

[]:             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Tue May 19, 2015 11:53 am BC Baron wrote: I always envisioned a brief sequence wherein Shinji, having completely failed at anything even remotely resembling a conversation with Asuka, stands by himself near the shoreline, grabs the nearest rock he can find and flings it towards the ocean with all of his remaining strength, momentarily distracting himself from everything as he simply enjoys the sight of the stone rapidly skimming over the red surface of the water, leaving intense ripples in its wake. Unfortunately, the newly reborn entity previously known as Misato Katsuragi happened to choose that precise moment to re-enter the world of the living and, just as she was in the process of leaving her non-corporeal, hive-mind existence behind forever, bracing to dramatically inhale her first breath of air the very instant her face triumphantly rose above the surface of the water... well, before she could even focus her newly-gained individual consciousness, something inexplicably struck her right between the eyes. Hey, nobody ever said this post Third Impact world would be all puppies and rainbows. Let that be a lesson to you. FIN

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Tue May 19, 2015 12:49 pm BC Baron wrote: I always envisioned a brief sequence wherein Shinji, having completely failed at anything even remotely resembling a conversation with Asuka, stands by himself near the shoreline, grabs the nearest rock he can find and flings it towards the ocean with all of his remaining strength, momentarily distracting himself from everything as he simply enjoys the sight of the stone rapidly skimming over the red surface of the water, leaving intense ripples in its wake. Unfortunately, the newly reborn entity previously known as Misato Katsuragi happened to choose that precise moment to re-enter the world of the living and, just as she was in the process of leaving her non-corporeal, hive-mind existence behind forever, bracing to dramatically inhale her first breath of air the very instant her face triumphantly rose above the surface of the water... well, before she could even focus her newly-gained individual consciousness, something inexplicably struck her right between the eyes. Hey, nobody ever said this post Third Impact world would be all puppies and rainbows. Let that be a lesson to you. FIN

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Tue May 19, 2015 2:10 pm We have an image of the two children where we left them, with Shinji laying on top of Asuka. The sea rolls gently against the beach. There is silence. And then, Asuka speaks. "Get off me." There is no reply. "...Seriously, get off. This is painful." Again...no reply. "...I can't breathe." The reply...does not come. "...You're asleep, aren't you? You actually fell asleep." There is still no reply! "God damn it, Shinji."

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Tue May 19, 2015 3:30 pm ^ Still better than a angst coma... unless while he's in the coma Moonlight Sonata is playing the background.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue May 19, 2015 4:22 pm This old gem tops it all (ignore the fact how embarrassingly old this thread is, I was an EMF/EGF newbie!): http://forum.evageeks.org/post/63422/Best-EMF-Quotes/#63422 Honestly, I could see Shinji, totally exhausted from everything, falling asleep on top of her. Notice where exactly his head's laying as he sobs
